title: AuditRulesManifest
description: Schema describing the audit-rules.json manifest read by select-audits.js and lib/audit-suite/runner.js. The manifest enumerates registered audit workflows and the triggers / substitution keys each one accepts.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped when the audits[] entry shape changes.

audits.description: Map of audit workflow name (matching the workflow filename without extension) to its trigger configuration.

substitutionKeys.description: Substitution keys this audit accepts via run-audit-suite --substitution. Empty array means no caller-supplied keys are allowed.

triggers.description: Selection criteria for whether this audit runs against a given ticket / changeset. At least one of `gates` or `alwaysRun: true` must be set for select-audits.js to ever pick the audit.

gates.description: Quality-gate identifiers (gate1..gateN) that include this audit.

alwaysRun.description: If true, the audit is always selected regardless of keyword / file-pattern matches.

keywords.description: Case-insensitive keywords matched against the ticket title + body.

filePatterns.description: Glob patterns matched against changed files in the diff.
